game.creator: 👤 Created by: {name}
game.use_buttons: Use the buttons below to control the game:
game.already_exists: 🚫 There is already a game in this chat.
game.already_joined_elsewhere: 🚫 You are already in another game.
game.no_game: 🚫 There is no game in this chat.
game.not_participating: 🚫 You are not participating in the game in this chat.
game.last_player_left:
👋 {name} was the last player and left the game.
🎮 Game over!
game.not_in_any_game: 🚫 You are not participating in any game!
game.game_not_found: 🚫 Error: the game you supposedly participated in no longer exists. Your game status has been reset.
game.not_in_game: 🚫 Error: you are not found in the game you were linked to. Your game status has been reset.
game.left_game_success: 👋 You successfully left the game in chat "{chat}".
game.left_game_last: 👋 You left the game in chat "{chat}", and it was ended since you were the last player.
game.cannot_kill: 🚫 You cannot end the game! Only the game creator or chat admin can do this.
game.cannot_kick: 🚫 You cannot kick players! Only the game creator or chat admin can do this.
game.player_not_found: 🚫 Player not found in the game.
game.already_joined: 🚫 You have already joined this game!
game.not_enough_players: 🚫 Not enough players to start the game! Minimum 2 players required.
game.start_permission_denied: 🚫 Only the game creator or a chat admin can start the game.
game.old_button: This button is no longer relevant.
game.change_mode: To change the mode, use the /settings menu.

settings.title: ⚙️ **Settings**
settings.stats_control:
📊 Statistics management has been moved to a unified settings menu.

👉 Please use the /{command} command to view or change your settings.

help.title: 🎮 **Help for "Durak" Game**
help.description: This bot allows you to play the card game "Durak" with friends in Telegram.
help.step1: 1. Create a new game with /new command
help.step2: 2. Other players can join with the "Join" button or /join command
help.step3: 3. When everyone is ready, click "Start Game"
help.game_desc: "Durak" is a popular card game where the goal is to get rid of all your cards.
help.players: The game is designed for 2-6 players.
help.cards: Each player receives 6 cards at the start of the game.
help.trump: One card is randomly chosen as the trump card.
help.goal: The first player to get rid of all cards wins.

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while leaving the game: {error}

system.critical_token: CRITICAL ERROR: BOT_TOKEN environment variable not found.
system.token_instructions: Please specify your bot token in the .env file and restart the application.
system.admins_warning: WARNING: ADMINS environment variable ('{admins}') contains non-numeric values and will be ignored.
